summary: LCX8-ACTION-0118/0119/0120 Client opportunity-to-intake flow proof: current UI handoff, conflict snapshot, and clearance token actions operated through browser/API with safe fixture write, idempotency replay, restart read-back, audit read-back, missing snapshot block, denied/review fail-closed probes, and clean browser network/console.
